en_title: SKY CLOUDS AND WAVES AND SAND
en_body:
..................................................................
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Horizon-Cloudline...Horizon-Cloudline
..sand and waves...sand and waves...sand and waves...
cát-đằng...cát-đằng...cát-đằng...cát-đằng.
Horizon-Cloudline...Horizon-Cloudline

..................................................................
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

(respectfully offered to Poet Chân-Trời-Chân-Mây and
 Sister Cát-Đằng: 05/03/01/2013)

...........SKY CLOUDS AND WAVES AND SAND.............


..................................................................
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Horizon-Cloudline...Horizon-Cloudline
..sand and waves...sand and waves...sand and waves...
cát-đằng...cát-đằng...cát-đằng...cát-đằng.
Horizon-Cloudline...Horizon-Cloudline

..................................................................
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

(respectfully offered to Poet Chân-Trời-Chân-Mây and
 Sister Cát-Đằng: 05/03/01/2013)

1
note: Chân-Trời-Chân-Mây and Cát-Đằng are preserved as personal or poetic names, while their literal imagery echoes horizon, cloudline, sand, and waves.
